abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Matrix server during import
abort.wrong_account: You must use the same account that was originally configured

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Matrix server

import.description: Import existing Matrix configuration from YAML
import.title: Import Matrix configuration

data_description.username: Your Matrix username including the domain (e.g. @user:matrix.org)

reauth_confirm.description: Update your Matrix credentials for {username} on {homeserver}
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Matrix

data_description.homeserver: The URL of your Matrix homeserver
data_description.username: Your Matrix username including the domain (e.g. @user:matrix.org)
data_description.verify_ssl: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of your homeserver

error.invalid_commands: Invalid commands. Each command needs a 'name' and exactly one trigger: 'word', 'expression', or 'reaction'
error.invalid_rooms: Invalid room format. Each room must start with ! (room ID) or # (room alias) followed by the server name (e.g. !roomid:matrix.org or #alias:matrix.org)

data_description.commands: List of word, expression, or reaction commands. Each command requires a 'name' and one of: 'word', 'expression', or 'reaction'. Optionally restrict to specific 'rooms'.
data_description.rooms:
List of room IDs or aliases to listen in. Example:
- "!roomid:matrix.org"
- "#alias:matrix.org"

init.description: Configure which rooms to listen in and which commands to respond to
init.title: Configure Matrix rooms and commands

format.description: Format of the message, either 'text' or 'html'.
format.name: Message format

images.description: One or more image paths to attach to the message.
images.name: Images

thread_id.description: An optional parent message ID to thread this message under.
thread_id.name: Thread ID

react.description: Sends a reaction to a message.

config_entry_id.description: The config entry to use when multiple Matrix accounts are configured.
config_entry_id.name: Config entry

message_id.description: The ID of the message to react to.
message_id.name: Message ID

room.description: The room to send the reaction to.
room.name: Room

react.name: React

config_entry_id.description: The config entry to use when multiple Matrix accounts are configured.
config_entry_id.name: Config entry

target.description: A list of room(s) to send the message to.
target.name: Target
